ValidationRule.description: Serbia Customer Care & Slovenia Customer Care
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( OR(RecordTypeId = "01220000000MFwy",RecordTypeId ="01220000000MG1A"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Door To Door'), OR( ISNULL( Service_Request_Date__c),ISNULL( Number_of_days__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Field: "Service request date" must be filled in and field "Number of days" must be equal to 0
